info.name: DESOFS Secure API
info.description:
Complete request set for all REST endpoints in this repository.

Includes a numbered Security Demo folder focused on authentication, authorization, rate limiting, token revocation, and document upload validation.

request.description: Public endpoint. Creates a new user and returns JWT token.
Public endpoint. Authenticates and returns JWT token.
Requires JWT. Stateless logout endpoint; client should discard the token after calling it.

item.name: Security Demo

request.description: Shows the default protected API behavior: document endpoints require a valid Bearer token.
Authenticates the bootstrap admin for RBAC-positive checks.

exec: pm.test(`${usernameVariable} exists in user list`, function () {

request.description: ADMIN-only endpoint. Captures seeded user IDs for later object-level authorization checks.
Authenticates a manager who manages the seeded Engineering department.
Authenticates the normal user who owns uploaded demo documents.
Authenticates another normal user used for forbidden object-access checks.
Shows RBAC enforcement: USER cannot call the ADMIN-only user listing endpoint.

item.name: 008 GET Own User Profile as USER

request.description: Shows object-level authorization allowing a user to read their own profile.
Shows object-level authorization denying a normal user access to another user profile.
Shows service-layer deny-by-default behavior for department governance.
Lists departments and captures the configured demo department, normally Engineering.

exec: pm.test('uploaded document is a PDF', function () {

request.description: Uploads a valid PDF into the demo department and captures its document ID.

item.name: 013 GET Uploaded Document Metadata as Owner

request.description: The owner can read metadata for their uploaded document.

item.name: 014 GET Download Uploaded PDF as Owner

request.description: The owner can download the PDF. Postman should show an application/pdf response.

item.name: 015 GET Uploaded Document as Department Manager

request.description: A manager for the document department can read department-scoped document metadata.

item.name: 016 GET Uploaded Document as Unrelated User - 403

request.description: A different USER cannot read another user document.
Shows MIME/content validation: plain text is rejected because only PDFs are allowed.
Shows PDF security inspection: this PDF contains a JavaScript open action and is rejected.
The owner can replace their document with another valid PDF.

item.name: 020 DELETE Uploaded Document as Unrelated User - 403

request.description: A different USER cannot delete another user document.
Creates a fresh token that will be revoked by the next request.
Revokes the fresh JWT server-side through the token revocation store.

item.name: 023 GET Protected Endpoint With Revoked Token - 401

request.description: The same token is now rejected on a protected endpoint.
Consumes the login identity rate-limit bucket with intentionally invalid credentials.
Consumes the login identity rate-limit bucket with intentionally invalid credentials.
Consumes the login identity rate-limit bucket with intentionally invalid credentials.
Consumes the login identity rate-limit bucket with intentionally invalid credentials.
Consumes the login identity rate-limit bucket with intentionally invalid credentials.
The sixth request for the same identity should be blocked with 429 Too Many Requests.
Optional cleanup request for the uploaded demo document.

item.description: Numbered demo requests for showcasing deny-by-default authentication, RBAC, object authorization, token revocation, auth rate limiting, PDF-only upload validation, unsafe PDF rejection, and document ownership controls.
